Title: Sandokan
Writer: Davide Lantieri, Scott Rosenbaum, Alessandro Sermoneta
Actors: Can Yaman, Ed Westwick, John Hannah
Plot: Sandokan is a Malaysian pirate who, along with his friend Yanez and their crew, attacks the British forces from his island of Mompracem. During his adventures, he falls in love with Lady Marianna Guillonk, an English-Italian arist...
